title: Diamond Star Apothecary Glass Candy Jar with Lids, Candy Buffet Display Elegant Storage Jars, Decorative Wedding Candy Canisters (Height: 12" Body: 6")
description:
About this item
Glass
✔Available in three sizes✔ These glass Apothecary Jars design in three different heights. A: H:12" D:6"; H:15" D:6.5"; H:19" D:7.5". Very stable and Made of hand-blown high-end sturdy clear glass. Plants or small items in jars on photos are not included in listing, they just for the purposes of item display
✔Beautiful Shape✔ These footed classic style apothecary jars are made from high-quality clear glass and has a unique shape that works for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing.
✔A must-have for wedding candy buffet tables✔ These beautifully decorated jars will add a touch of elegance to your wedding or home. They are the right size to showcase cookies, candy, treats, honey, fudge, spices, baths salts or other delightful treats of your choice
✔Wide range of uses✔ This large glass Apothecary jar is versatile and also can be used with decor items. It looks great with petals, water, sand, pine cones, maples leaves or flowers to add jubilant energy flows into your environment
✔GUARANTEED✔ If the glass jar is broken during transportation, please contact us and we will provide you with a replacement at the first time.
reviews_5s:
I purchased this to hold and display rocks and seaglass that I've collected over the years. It's works perfectly for this. The lid sits on top of the container, but it doesn't have a plastic gasket or anything to make it an air tight seal. This doesn't matter in my application. This container is a great size and I love the lid gives it great height. I measured the base at 7". It has a small lip at the bottom that gives it an extra 1/2" all around. The main part of the cylinder is about 6". It's about 11" tall without the lid. The lid is about 6" tall, which makes the entire container about 16" tall (about 1" of the lid sits inside the cylinder). The width of the lid is about 5".

The product came well packaged and after a quick wash, I put it to use right away. Love it!!It does have a couple spots in the glass that look like bubble spots. Thankfully my spots are on the bottom and then on one side (that I can hide when filled. For the price, this is an excellent item. Glass polishes up to be spotless and crystal clear. It's thickness is great, it's glass lid and glass base so don't be rough with it, no apothecary jars are very durable if you don't know how to treat them (glass people, they are literally glass lol). IF you are rough and can't play gently with nice things, get the plastic acrylic apothecary jars or at minimum get the ones that have lids that have rubber gaskets in them. I knew exactly what I was getting in this, it displays beautifully, if you open and close the lid gently, you won't have an issue at all. Packaged very well, and couldn't be happier with this purchase!perfect size and great lid for being able to decorate once closedExactly as shown. Purchased with 2 other apothecary jars in different sizes for our kitchen island.
Nice glass weight.. not too heavy. Would make a lovely gift.
No breakage and package very nicely. Top fits perfect.
Can use for candy, nuts, flowers- anything you can think of. This one is large enough to even be a cute fish bowl.
I am very glad I purchased.I ended up filling it with white taffy super cute decor as well as quick treat to grab.I had bought a candy jar locally and planned to add a couple more to it for different candies and the store quit carrying them. I wound up ordering this one and it paired up perfectly! Great quality! Fast shipping!After reading some of the reviews I'm a bit confused on how some one can think these are cheap thin glass.. I tried taking a good pic on just how thick they actually are .. really not thin at all in my opinion.

Was packed with care , came in perfect, they definitely dont look "cheap"

I bought 2 , planning to use them for a candy bar for my baby shower :)Spent months looking for containers I liked enough to use as closed plant terrariums and settled on this one. Absolutely love it and it's doing very well at keeping humidity contained. It is not airtight by any means and I also worry about the durability of the lid, but overall it's working out well and the glass is very clear.I bought this for a present and it was well received.I love this jar, its very pretty and seems like its good quality. perfect height to fit under my kitchen cabinets without being too tall or too short.
reviews_1s: This was a waste of $40.The product arrived in a thousand little pieces. I didn’t even have to open the box. I have reordered but am worried that this may happen again?Major disappointment! I wanted this for epsom salts in my bathroom. It arrived with the lid completely shattered and spilled glass ALL over my house where I opened it. Started a return process but kind of sucks I am responsible for sending back a busted glass container just to get my money back. And I'm still out the storage container I was after in the first place. Ugh, such a waste of time and money!This came shattered. It's seemingly poor quality, thin, and cheap. Waste of money, time, and very dangerous sharp thin glass. No care was taken in getting this out if you know what I mean. You will never get this in one piece, and you've been warned.Looks better in the photo. Extremely thin glass with a cheap feel. Although it looks solid, IT IS NOT. save your money and get a nice one, this is not the one.2nd jar ordered - first one shattered, 2nd one lid did not fitItem literally delivered in tiny pieces of glass! Precautions were not taken to securely package and ship the item. Bummed because it was exactly what I was looking for :(These vases are cheaply made of thin class. They are not worth the cost. Highly, very highly priced for the quality.... made in CHINA cheap stuff. Can NOT be used as candy jars.Nothing ,I was very happy that I had received it. BUT IT ARIVED BROKEN IN PISCES .I received it today. It was broken. The shipping of the outside box should note :fragile ，not the inside box .
